summary:
The classification for profound hearing loss according to the World Health Organization involves thresholds exceeding 90 decibels, which corresponds directly to choice C based on current medical standards and research findings presented here. To be precise per their criteria, any measurement above this level would fall under profoundly impaired auditory function. \boxed{C}

The summary accurately captures that profound hearing loss requires an audiometric threshold over 90dB but includes extraneous information not strictly necessary or aligned closely enough with justifying why 'option C' was chosen from given choices provided initially without referencing them explicitly again at end since those were removed during editing process earlier already. To be precise per their criteria, any measurement above this level would fall under profoundly impaired auditory function. \boxed{C}
